---
title: "YouTube Tutorials"
page-layout: full
description: "Watch my latest video tutorials and presentations on spatial data science."
---

Welcome to my YouTube channel section. Here I share practical tutorials, tips, and insights on Google Earth Engine, spatial data analysis, and open-source GIS tools. 

[<i class="bi bi-youtube"></i> Subscribe to Spatial Geography](https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography){.btn .btn-danger .mb-5}

## 🌍 Google Earth Engine Workflows

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm .border-0}
<div class="card-header bg-white fw-bold" style="color: #1e293b; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; padding: 15px 20px;">
  Google Earth Engine Local Export with Python
</div>
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9">
  <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/TPCmcoE8TbA?si=UYgiSOTXiFZ8mGE4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
::: {.card-body style="background: #f8fafc; color: #475569;"}
Learn how to efficiently export Google Earth Engine data directly to your local machine using Python, saving valuable EECU hours.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm .border-0}
<div class="card-header bg-white fw-bold" style="color: #1e293b; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; padding: 15px 20px;">
  LULC Sample Generator: Spatial Geography
</div>
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9">
  <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Bpt1lgurIMs?si=FE6wzzX1XbG4obsJ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
::: {.card-body style="background: #f8fafc; color: #475569;"}
A comprehensive guide to generating training samples for Land Use Land Cover (LULC) classification using automated spatial techniques.
:::
:::
:::

:::

<hr style="margin: 3rem 0; border-color: #e2e8f0;">

## 🚀 Getting Started with GEE

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm .border-0}
<div class="card-header bg-white fw-bold" style="color: #1e293b; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; padding: 15px 20px;">
  How to Sign Up for Google Earth Engine
</div>
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9">
  <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Lfaamxqqk7k?si=Dq1_sigLBhGafh2e" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
::: {.card-body style="background: #f8fafc; color: #475569;"}
New to Google Earth Engine? Watch this step-by-step tutorial on how to register and set up your first GEE account for spatial analysis.
:::
:::
:::

:::
